channel.title: 关于我们 | About Us on Beijing Digital Health Research Institute
channel.description: Recent content in 关于我们 | About Us on Beijing Digital Health Research Institute

item.title: 研究会简介 | Institute Introduction
item.description:
研究会简介 | Institute Introduction

中文： 北京数字健康研究会（Beijing Digital Health Research Institute，简称BJDHR）成立于2024年，是由北京市卫生健康委员会主管的学术性社会团体。研究会致力于推动数字健康领域的学术研究、技术创新和产业应用，促进健康医疗大数据、人工智能、物联网等新技术在健康领域的深度融合与应用。

English: The Beijing Digital Health Research Institute (BJDHR), established in 2024, is an academic social organization supervised by the Beijing Municipal Health Commission. The Institute is dedicated to promoting academic research, technological innovation, and industrial applications in the field of digital health, facilitating the deep integration and application of new technologies such as health big data, artificial intelligence, and Internet of Things in healthcare.

item.title: 章程制度 | Charter & Regulations
item.description:
章程制度 | Charter & Regulations

北京数字健康研究会章程 | BJDHR Charter

第一章 总则 | Chapter 1 General Provisions

第一条 | Article 1 本会名称：北京数字健康研究会（英文名：Beijing Digital Health Research Institute，缩写：BJDHR）。

The name of this organization: Beijing Digital Health Research Institute (Abbreviation: BJDHR).

第二条 | Article 2 本会性质：由北京市从事数字健康相关领域的企事业单位、高等院校、科研机构和个人自愿组成的学术性、非营利性社会团体。

Nature: An academic, non-profit social organization voluntarily formed by enterprises, institutions, universities, research organizations and individuals engaged in digital health related fields in Beijing.

第三条 | Article 3 本会宗旨：遵守宪法、法律、法规和国家政策，践行社会主义核心价值观，推动数字健康领域学术研究与技术创新，促进数字健康产业发展。

item.title: 组织架构 | Organization Structure
item.description:
组织架构 | Organization Structure

主管单位 | Supervising Authority

北京市卫生健康委员会

Beijing Municipal Health Commission

理事会 | Board of Directors

  • 理事长：张明教授 | President: Prof. Zhang Ming
  • 副理事长：李华博士、王强研究员 | Vice Presidents: Dr. Li Hua, Researcher Wang Qiang
  • 秘书长：陈静 | Secretary General: Chen Jing

专业委员会 | Professional Committees

  1. 数字医疗专业委员会 | Digital Medical Committee
  2. 健康大数据专业委员会 | Health Big Data Committee
  3. 人工智能与健康专业委员会 | AI and Health Committee
  4. 数字健康标准专业委员会 | Digital Health Standards Committee
